goal: First, create the following notes in Markor: 1) A note named 'soup.md' with content 'Boil vegetables, blend until smooth, season with salt'. 2) A note named 'sandwich.md' with content 'Layer ham, cheese, lettuce on bread, toast lightly'. Then, add the recipes from all recipe notes (soup.md and sandwich.md) in Markor to the Broccoli recipe app. Use the file name (without .md) as the recipe title.

notes.content: Boil vegetables, blend until smooth, season with salt
Layer ham, cheese, lettuce on bread, toast lightly

expected_recipes.title: soup
expected_recipes.description: Boil vegetables, blend until smooth, season with salt

expected_recipes.title: sandwich
expected_recipes.description: Layer ham, cheese, lettuce on bread, toast lightly
